description: Come home to this spacious 4 bed 3.5 bath townhome at Polygon's Ridgewood in Coquitlam. This bright 2,233 sq. ft. home boasts overheight ceilings, laminate wood flooring, expansive windows and your own deck. The kitchen offers a central island, custom-designed cabinetry with extra wall pantry storage, sleek appliances and engineered stone countertops. The primary bedroom offers a large walk-in closet and the ensuite features a tub and spa shower with bench. Plus, enjoy a separate laundry room with built-in shelving upstairs, the convenience of a family room downstairs, and a heat pump air conditioning system.  Visit our sales office and display homes at 3637 Sheffield Avenue, Coquitlam, open noon - 5pm daily (except Friday), to learn more
